channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
### Added
- **Device pairing sheet** — when connecting to a gateway that requires device authorization, ClawDeck now shows a native pairing dialog instead of silently failing
  - Detects gateway close code 1008 ("pairing required") during WebSocket handshake
  - Opens the gateway control UI in the browser for one-click pairing approval
  - Retry button reconnects automatically after pairing is complete
  - Works from both initial setup and reconnection flows

---
**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.2.1...v1.3.0
